tasks.objective: Validate Ubuntu chat backend health and API response evidence for website integration
tasks.summary: Health and chat endpoint validations passed with no out-of-scope edits.

tasks.objective: Validate ngrok-backed Lariel chat endpoint end-to-end from external Windows client
tasks.summary: All three checks passed: /health HTTP 200, backend healthy 49 docs qwen2.5:14b, /api/chat returning accurate answers.

tasks.objective: Initialize Git-based sync transport between Windows Main and Ubuntu Worker
tasks.summary: Repo pushed to GitHub. Ubuntu Worker cloned successfully. Git sync loop confirmed operational.

tasks.objective: First real two-machine Git loop. Pull this task from GitHub on Ubuntu, perform a RAG knowledge base status snapshot, push result back to GitHub for Main review.
tasks.summary: Result was placeholder-only and failed required evidence checks; retried as TASK-0004A.

tasks.objective: Retry TASK-0004 with full evidence. Produce a complete RAG knowledge base status snapshot from Ubuntu and push results through Git.
tasks.summary: Approved with exception: evidence complete except direct Chroma query mismatch; follow-up issued as TASK-0005.

tasks.objective: Diagnose and resolve Chroma collection path mismatch between Flask /health output and direct shell access.
tasks.summary: Passed. Canonical backend Chroma path identified as site_kb_chromadb with lariel_site_kb count 49; mismatch explained by separate services and data dirs.

tasks.objective: Operationalize the Chroma path fix by adding a repeatable verification script that proves /health and direct Chroma counts stay aligned for lariel_site_kb.
tasks.summary: Passed. Verifier script confirms /health.documents equals direct lariel_site_kb count (49) with correct success/failure exit behavior.

tasks.objective: Validate Architecture v1 runtime assumptions on Ubuntu and return a fact-checked architecture evidence bundle.
tasks.summary: All runtime checks passed. Architecture drift (kimi-k2.6:cloud) reconciled as inactive/scrapped. Baseline updated.

tasks.objective: Validate quarantine control path by simulating 3 consecutive bounded task failures and confirming worker quarantine behavior is triggered and recorded.
tasks.summary: Passed. Three simulated failures recorded; quarantine condition triggered and post-quarantine behavior flagged for procedural enforcement.

tasks.objective: Perform the first real low-risk file edit under approval gate by adding a small operational note file and validating no out-of-scope changes.
tasks.summary: Passed. Worker created bounded state note file with required fields and no out-of-scope edits.

tasks.objective: Final pilot audit. Worker reviews full ledger and confirms all pilot exit criteria are met.
tasks.summary: All five pilot exit criteria PASS. MIDE pilot_v1 certified as complete and operational.

tasks.objective: Post-reboot system recovery. Restart Ollama, site_kb_server, and ngrok.
tasks.summary: All backend services restored. Ollama running, Flask RAG on :8091 healthy (49 docs), ngrok tunnel active at https://jawed-lapel-dispersed.ngrok-free.dev. Worker resolved missing chromadb module via pip install.

tasks.objective: Fix CORS on site_kb_server.py to allow ngrok-skip-browser-warning header.
tasks.summary: CORS preflight now returns Access-Control-Allow-Headers: ngrok-skip-browser-warning. Health check OK. Chat from larielsystems.com is unblocked.

tasks.objective: Repair site_kb_server upstream Ollama endpoint so /api/chat no longer returns 500.
tasks.summary: Worker patched site_kb_server from unsupported Ollama /api/chat to working /api/generate request shape. Validation passed: /health 200, local /api/chat 200, public ngrok /api/chat 200.

tasks.objective: Implement Phase-1 worker mtask autopilot loop (git pull, assigned-task selection, execution, result commit/push).
tasks.summary: Approved. Autopilot script delivered with lock, polling, worker assignment filtering, and result commit/push behavior. Dry-run and synthetic cycle evidence provided (TASK-9015-SYNTH committed by worker).

tasks.objective: Enable persistent worker autopilot service and heartbeat visibility.
tasks.summary: Approved. Worker repaired service startup, confirmed systemd user service active, autopilot process running in background, status file updating, and heartbeat commit evidence present.
